MODULE: cosmos.integration.trading.fallback_manager
FILE: cosmos/integration/trading/fallback_manager.py (260 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Fallback Manager for Trading Operations.

Manages the priority order and health of different trading backends.

CLASSES:
- BackendStatus(Enum)
- BackendHealth: Health status of a trading backend.
- FallbackManager: Manage trading backend health and fallback order.

Tracks:
- Backend availabilit
  Methods: def get_backends_for_request(self, chain: str, action: str) -> List[str]
  Methods: def record_success(self, backend: str, latency_ms: float)
  Methods: def record_failure(self, backend: str, error: str=None)
  Methods: async def check_backend_health(self, backend: str) -> BackendStatus
  Methods: async def check_all_backends(self)
  Methods: def reorder_priority(self)
  Methods: def get_status_report(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
